heroHeadline: Ukraine: Frontline 'Strongest in a Year'; Turkey Moves to Revive Peace Talks
heroSubtitle: Ukrainian officials report the frontline position is the strongest in approximately one year, with Zelensky calling for new peace negotiations from a position of battlefield strength. Turkey is actively working to revive Russia-Ukraine talks, with President Erdoğan briefing NATO Secretary General on Ankara's mediation initiative.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
